title: Prisms Create
description:
A Create based modpack including mods such as:
Create
Artifacts
Farmers Delight
Create Aeronautics
body:
A Create based Modpack for me, my friends and anyone else.

This Modpack includes the following mods:
Create + Addons
Artifacts
Farmers Delight
Panda's Falling Trees
Just Enough Items (JEI) + EMI
Jade (Waila Fork)
Lootr
Not Enough Animations
Pick Up Notifier
Sound Physics Remastered
Towns and Towers
Vein Mining
Visuality
Particular
Particle Rain
Wakes
Explosive Enhancement
Cool Rain
AmbientSounds
Xaero's Minimap + Worldmap

This modpack also includes the following performance mods, and shaders.
Mods:
Sodium
Lithium
Iris
Sodium Extra
Reeses Sodium Options

Shaders:
Complementary Shaders - Unbound
